hooks.name: bootstrap
hooks.description: Detect uv, install dependencies, and ensure plugin is ready

hooks.name: auto-reindex
hooks.description: Auto-reindex repository after Edit or Write tool use

hooks.name: nudge
hooks.description: Nudge Claude to prefer semantic search over grep/cat

hooks.name: compact-reinject
hooks.description: Re-inject plugin instructions after context compaction

hooks.name: git-post-commit-reindex
hooks.description: Auto-reindex after git commit for files changed in the commit
